title: Generating JSON-FLD for a Data Transformation Pipeline
scenario: Design a JSON artifact representing a data transformation pipeline. The output should be a valid JSON-FLD (JSON Format for Linked Data) document illustrating the pipeline's structure, including all operations, inputs, and outputs. The document should be readable and easily understandable.
constraints: Must be readable and understandable without additional context
Must illustrate the entire pipeline's structure, including all operations, inputs, and outputs
Must adhere to the JSON-FLD syntax and semantics

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluates if the generated document is readable and easily understandable.
Verifies if the document accurately represents the pipeline's structure, including all operations, inputs, and outputs.
Checks if the generated document adheres to the JSON-FLD syntax and semantics.
